name: exiflooter
title: exiflooter
summary: finds geolocation on all image urls and directories
description:
finds geolocation on all image urls and directories
ExifLooter finds geolocation on all image urls and directories also integrates
with OpenStreetMap.

commands.name: exiflooter
commands.description: ExifLooter finds GeoLocation Metadata and display. You can use with pipe and flags

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use exiflooter because finds geolocation on all image urls and directories.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use exiflooter as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `exiflooter [options] [args]` as documented upstream for exiflooter.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair exiflooter with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `exiflooter --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
